creator: ltning-freebsd@anduin.net
text:
(In reply to Gerard Seibert from comment #217)
You are of course aware that, unlike certain other UNIX-like operating systems, FreeBSD is largely developed by volunteers on their spare time or in some lucky cases tolerated/supported by their employers?

And being aware of that, perhaps a less confrontational and demanding tone would be a more logical (and polite!) approach?

/Eirik
